commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=975c3abc558a560f2ab42f53dd57b64e926a7c18)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps the Telegram stale spool-claim recovery rename with ENOENT/EEXIST handling and adds a Telegram ingress spool test for vanished processing files.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +32. Total +44 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can throw ENOENT from the final recovery rename after earlier discovery if another drain path removes the file. The PR's added test does not reproduce that exact path because it unlinks before calling recovery.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This should stay in normal PR review because the contributor needs to correct the regression test and after-fix proof; ClawSweeper cannot provide the contributor's real behavior proof for them.

target.title: fix(telegram): handle ENOENT race in spool drain recovery rename
target.author: sebtardif
